mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-05#SQL001 */ * FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) OVER() AS totalRow, T.* FROM( SELECT A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE, B.BB_PRODUCT_NAME, MUAI.BROKER_CODE, E1.BRANCH_NAME AS BROKER_NAME, F.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE AS BRANCH_CODE, E2.BRANCH_NAME , MUAI.INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD, CASE F.BROKER_CHARGE_CODE WHEN '0000' THEN '' ELSE F.BROKER_CHARGE_NAME END AS BROKER_CHARGE_NAME, MUAI.BUTEN_CODE, MUAI.ACCOUNT_NUMBER, MUAI.NAME_KANJI, MUAI.NAME_KANA, A.BB_INVESTOR_ATT_NAME, A.BB_QUANTITY, B.BB_GESTURE_VALUE, CASE WHEN D.LOTTERY_RESULT = '4' THEN NVL(D.QUANTITY_ALLOC, 0) --4:裁量配分(対面募集注文テーブル) ELSE NVL(G.QUANTITY_SAIRYOU,0) END AS QUANTITY_SAIRYOU, CASE WHEN A.BB_STRIKE_PRICE = '0' AND B.BB_GESTURE_VALUE = '1' THEN A.BB_PRICE || '' WHEN A.BB_STRIKE_PRICE = '0' AND B.BB_GESTURE_VALUE = '2' THEN RTRIM(TO_CHAR(A.BB_DISCOUNT, 'FM990.9999'), '.') ELSE '成行' END AS BB_PRICE, CASE WHEN D.LOTTERY_RESULT IS NOT NULL THEN D.LOTTERY_RESULT WHEN A.BB_WINNING = '2' AND A.BB_EXCLUSION = '4' THEN '4' --裁量配分 WHEN A.BB_WINNING = '2' AND A.BB_EXCLUSION <> '4' THEN '2' --落選 ELSE A.BB_WINNING END AS LOTTERY_RESULT, CASE WHEN D.LOTTERY_RESULT IN ('1','3','5') THEN NVL(D.QUANTITY_ALLOC, 0) || '' --1:当選,3:当選(繰上)(対面募集注文テーブル),5:申込取消 WHEN D.LOTTERY_RESULT IN ('2','4') THEN '0' --2:落選,4:裁量配分(対面募集注文テーブル) WHEN A.BB_WINNING = '0' THEN '-' --抽選前 WHEN A.BB_WINNING = '1' THEN A.BB_QUANTITY_ALLOC || '' --当選 WHEN A.BB_WINNING = '2' AND A.BB_EXCLUSION = '4' THEN '0' --裁量配分 ELSE '0' END AS BB_QUANTITY_ALLOC, CASE WHEN D.LOTTERY_RESULT IN ('2','5') THEN '-' --落選,申込取消, WHEN J.ORDER_STATUS IS NULL AND A.BB_WINNING = '0' THEN '-' --抽選前 WHEN J.ORDER_STATUS IS NULL AND A.BB_WINNING = '2' AND A.BB_EXCLUSION <> '4' THEN '-' --落選 WHEN J.ORDER_STATUS IS NULL AND A.BB_WINNING = '2' AND A.BB_EXCLUSION = '4' THEN '0' --裁量配分、未注文 WHEN J.ORDER_STATUS IS NULL AND A.BB_WINNING = '1' THEN '0' --当選、未注文 ELSE J.ORDER_STATUS END AS ORDER_STATUS, CASE WHEN D.LOTTERY_RESULT IN ('1','3','4') THEN J.ORDER_COUNT || '' --抽選前、落選、申込取消 ELSE '-' END AS ORDER_COUNT, J.DEPOSIT_TYPE, J.INVITATION_TYPE, J.WARNING_APPLY, J.DETAIL_NUMBER, A.BB_CREATE_SECTION_NAME, A.BB_REMARK, A.BB_UPDATE_DATE, NVL(H.PRESENTATION_DATE, B.BB_SETTLE_DATE) AS PRESENTATION_DATE, A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, A.BB_CREATE_USER_NAME, TO_CHAR(A.BB_CREATE_DATE,'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS BB_CREATE_DATE, TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE,'yyyymmddhh24miss') AS SYS_DATE, D.BUTEN_CODE || LPAD(D.ACCOUNT_NUMBER, 7, 0) || D.PRODUCT_CODE AS UPLOAD_KEY, DECODE(P.EDELIV_AGREEMENT_KBN, 1, TO_CHAR(P.EDELIV_AGREEMENT_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), '') AS EDELIV_AGREEMENT_DATE, TO_CHAR(I.READ_TIME,'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI')AS READ_TIME FROM ETINTRA.BB_ACCEPT A INNER JOIN ETINTRA.BB_PRODUCT_MASTER B ON A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = B.BB_PRODUCT_CODE AND A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(B.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM,'YYYYMMDD')) INNER JOIN MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO MUAI ON A.BB_BRANCH_CODE = RPAD(MUAI.BUTEN_CODE, 4, ' ') AND TO_NUMBER(A.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(MUAI.ACCOUNT_NUMBER) LEFT JOIN M_IPO_PO_BB_PERIOD H ON A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = H.PRODUCT_CODE AND A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = H.PRESENTATION_FROM LEFT JOIN T_IPO_PO_ORDER D ON A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = D.PRODUCT_CODE AND A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = D.PRESENTATION_FROM AND A.BB_BRANCH_CODE = RPAD(D.BUTEN_CODE, 4, ' ') AND TO_NUMBER(A.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(D.ACCOUNT_NUMBER) LEFT JOIN MEDIATE_BRANCH E1 ON MUAI.BROKER_CODE = E1.BROKER_CODE AND E1.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE = '999' LEFT JOIN MEDIATE_CHARGE_INFO F ON MUAI.BROKER_CODE = F.BROKER_CODE AND MUAI.INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD = F.BROKER_CHARGE_CODE AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEDIATE_CHARGE_INFO F2 WHERE MUAI.BROKER_CODE = F2.BROKER_CODE AND MUAI.INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD = F2.BROKER_CHARGE_CODE ) = 1 LEFT JOIN MEDIATE_BRANCH E2 ON MUAI.BROKER_CODE = E2.BROKER_CODE AND F.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE = E2.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE LEFT JOIN ETINTRA.SR_ACCEPT G ON A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = G.BB_PRODUCT_CODE AND A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = G.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM AND A.BB_BRANCH_CODE = G.BB_BRANCH_CODE AND TO_NUMBER(A.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(G.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) LEFT JOIN T_IPO_PO_EDELIV_AGRMNT P ON P.BUTEN_CODE = MUAI.BUTEN_CODE AND P.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = MUAI.ACCOUNT_NUMBER LEFT JOIN T_IPO_PO_DOCUMENT_READ I ON I.BUTEN_CODE = MUAI.BUTEN_CODE AND I.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = MUAI.ACCOUNT_NUMBER AND B.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = I.PRODUCT_CODE AND A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = I.PRESENTATION_FROM AND I.DOCUMENT_ID = '00000' AND I.VERSION_NUMBER = '000000' LEFT JOIN CORDYS.T_IPO_PO_ORDER_DETAIL J ON J.PRODUCT_CODE = D.PRODUCT_CODE AND J.PRESENTATION_FROM = D.PRESENTATION_FROM AND J.BUTEN_CODE = D.BUTEN_CODE AND J.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = D.ACCOUNT_NUMBER ) T WHERE T.ORDER_STATUS = '1' ORDER BY T.UPLOAD_KEY ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{querySizeLimit}

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-05#SQL004 */ LPAD(D.BUTEN_CODE,4,' ') AS BUTEN_CODE, LPAD(D.ACCOUNT_NUMBER,11,'0') AS ACCOUNT_NUMBER, CASE WHEN H.ATTACHED_BRAND = '1' THEN D.PRODUCT_CODE || H.ATTACHED_BRAND ELSE D.PRODUCT_CODE END AS PRODUCT_CODE, LPAD(D.ORDER_COUNT,11,'0') AS ORDER_COUNT, CASE WHEN D.DEPOSIT_TYPE = '2' THEN ' ' WHEN D.DEPOSIT_TYPE = '4' THEN '4' WHEN D.DEPOSIT_TYPE = 'H' THEN '6' WHEN D.DEPOSIT_TYPE = '1' AND E.UAI_SPECIFIC_KBN = '1' THEN '1' WHEN D.DEPOSIT_TYPE = '1' AND E.UAI_SPECIFIC_KBN = '2' THEN '1' ELSE ' ' END AS DEPOSIT_TYPE, SUBSTR(H.PAYMENT_DATE, 5) AS PAYMENT_DATE, D.INVITATION_TYPE, D.ORDER_METHOD, TO_CHAR(D.ORDER_TIME,'MMDD') AS ORDER_DAY, TO_CHAR(D.ORDER_TIME,'HH24MI') AS ORDER_HOUR, (SELECT DECODE(COUNT(1), 0, ' ', 1) AS ALERT FROM SVC_ACCT_PROFILE_IFAP I1 WHERE I1.PROFILE_NAME = 'AccountMode' AND I1.PROFILE_VALUE = 'MARGIN' AND I1.ACCT_ID = E.BUTEN_CODE || '-' || SUBSTR('000000' || E.ACCOUNT_NUMBER, -7 )) AS ALERT_FOR_MARGIN, (SELECT DECODE(COUNT(1), 0, ' ', 1) AS ALERT FROM SVC_ACCT_PROFILE_IFAP I1 WHERE I1.PROFILE_NAME = 'MinorRelation' AND I1.PROFILE_VALUE = 'MINOR' AND I1.ACCT_ID = E.BUTEN_CODE || '-' || SUBSTR('000000' || E.ACCOUNT_NUMBER, -7 )) AS ALERT_FOR_MINOR, ( SELECT DECODE(COUNT(1), 0, ' ', 1) AS ALERT FROM ( SELECT I1.CAU_BUTEN_CODE AS BUTEN_CODE FROM CONTRACT_APPLICATION_USER I1 WHERE I1.CAU_BUTEN_CODE = E.BUTEN_CODE AND TO_NUMBER(I1.CAU_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = E.ACCOUNT_NUMBER AND I1.CAU_APL_SERVICE_ID = '02' AND I1.CAU_APL_STATUS = '2' UNION ALL SELECT I2.BUTEN_CODE AS BUTEN_CODE FROM CONTRACT_APL_USER_SHINSEI I2 WHERE I2.BUTEN_CODE = E.BUTEN_CODE AND I2.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = E.ACCOUNT_NUMBER AND I2.APL_SERVICE_ID = '02' AND I2.APL_STATUS = '2' ) ) AS ALERT_FOR_SSNB, DECODE(D.DEPOSIT_TYPE, '4', '1', 'H', '1', ' ') AS ALERT_FOR_NISA, CASE WHEN D.WARNING_APPLY = '1' THEN D.WARNING_APPLY ELSE ' ' END AS WARNING_APPLY, J.BB_CREATE_SECTION_NAME FROM CORDYS.T_IPO_PO_ORDER_DETAIL D INNER JOIN MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO E ON D.BUTEN_CODE = E.BUTEN_CODE AND D.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = E.ACCOUNT_NUMBER INNER JOIN M_IPO_PO_BB_PERIOD H ON D.PRODUCT_CODE = H.PRODUCT_CODE AND D.PRESENTATION_FROM = H.PRESENTATION_FROM INNER JOIN ETINTRA.BB_ACCEPT J ON D.PRODUCT_CODE = J.BB_PRODUCT_CODE AND D.PRESENTATION_FROM = J.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM AND D.BUTEN_CODE = SUBSTR(J.BB_BRANCH_CODE,1,3) AND D.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(J.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) WHERE D.ORDER_STATUS = '9' ORDER BY D.BUTEN_CODE, D.ACCOUNT_NUMBER, D.PRODUCT_CODE
